name: Noosphere Browser v1.0.0
body:
## 🔮 Noosphere Browser v1.0.0-alpha

### What's New
- Initial release
- Semantic HTML parsing
- Entity extraction (persons, orgs, locations, URLs, dates)
- Relation extraction (triples)
- Markdown output
- JSON storage
- Multi-platform (Linux, macOS, Windows, Raspberry Pi)

### Installation

```bash
# Quick install
curl -fsSL https://git.io/noosphere-install | bash

# Or download binary for your platform below
```

### Platforms
- 🐧 Linux x86_64
- 🐧 Linux ARM64 (Raspberry Pi 4)
- 🐧 Linux ARMv7 (Raspberry Pi 3)
- 🍎 macOS Intel
- 🍎 macOS Apple Silicon
- 🪟 Windows x86_64

### For AI Agents
See [AGENTS.md](https://github.com/developerfred/noosphere-browser-v1/blob/master/AGENTS.md) for agent integration guide.

### Build from Source
```bash
git clone https://github.com/developerfred/noosphere-browser-v1
cd noosphere-browser-v1
make build
```

⚠️ **Note**: Pre-built binaries coming soon. For now, build from source (requires Zig 0.13+).
